name: Remove scroll behavior and ensure all form items are visible in SignUpForm
goal: Modify the SignUpForm component to remove any internal scrolling and ensure all form fields are visible within the container without requiring the user to scroll.
summary: The user wants to keep the form title but remove the scroll behavior from the sign-up form. All items should appear in the form without scrolling. This requires adjusting the container height and overflow properties in the SignUpForm component and potentially the parent container in signup/page.tsx to accommodate the content without clipping or scrolling.
context_assumptions: The SignUpForm component currently has a fixed height or overflow-y-auto that causes scrolling.
The parent container in signup/page.tsx has a fixed height (h-[600px]) which might need adjustment to fit the form without scrolling.
The form fields are standard inputs (email, password, etc.) that should fit within a reasonable height.

files_to_modify.purpose: Adjust the container height to allow the form to expand without scrolling, or remove the fixed height if it restricts visibility.
Ensure the form itself does not have overflow-y-auto or fixed height that causes scrolling. Allow it to grow naturally.

constraints: Do not add scrollbars or overflow-y-auto to the form container.
Ensure the form title 'Create Account' remains visible.
Maintain the existing visual style and layout structure.
acceptance_criteria: The sign-up form does not have any internal scrolling.
All form fields (Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password) and the submit button are visible without scrolling.
The form title 'Create Account' is still present and visible.
The layout remains responsive and visually consistent with the rest of the application.
notes: The previous fixed height of h-[600px] on the main container in signup/page.tsx was removed to allow the container to expand based on content. The form component itself was also updated to ensure no internal scrolling is forced.
